title: stipa caespitosa
intro: Stipa caespitosa, also known as the bunchgrass or grama grass, is a perennial bunchgrass native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stipa caespitosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and alleviate congestion. Herbal preparations of Stipa caespitosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried roots and leaves in hot water.
